FFmpeg component used by FeiGe
================================

Version: n7.1.5-2-g998de74adf-20260713
Variant: Windows x64 LGPL shared build
Binary provider: BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds

Build release:
https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds/releases/tag/latest

Build scripts and corresponding build configuration:
https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds

FFmpeg source:
https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg

Corresponding FFmpeg revision:
https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/commit/998de74adf

License:
FFMPEG-LGPL-3.0.txt in this directory.

This FFmpeg build is a separate executable/shared-library component. It was
built with --disable-libfdk-aac, --disable-libx264, and --disable-libx265 and
does not use FFmpeg's --enable-gpl or --enable-nonfree build options.
